meta.summary: CheckM2 1.1.0 runtime for machine-learning assessment of microbial genome-bin completeness and contamination. The compatible DIAMOND database is external project data.
meta.description: CheckM2 1.1.0 runtime for machine-learning assessment of microbial genome-bin completeness and contamination. The compatible DIAMOND database is external project data.

test: checkm2 --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx '1.1.0' >/dev/null && checkm2 -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'CheckM2 v1.1.0' >/dev/null && checkm2 predict -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--database_path' >/dev/null && checkm2 database -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--no_write_json_db' >/dev/null && checkm2 testrun -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--database_path' >/dev/null

python -c 'from checkm2 import version; from checkm2.versionControl import VersionControl; import tensorflow, lightgbm, sklearn, pandas, numpy, scipy; assert version.__version__ == "1.1.0"; db = VersionControl().return_highest_compatible_DB_version(); assert db == ("3", "10.5281/zenodo.14897628"); assert VersionControl().checksum_test_genomes(); print("checkm2 python deps ok")' >/dev/null
diamond version 2>&1 | grep -F 'diamond version 2.1.11' >/dev/null && prodigal -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'Prodigal V2.6.3' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-checkm2-db-boundary-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; if checkm2 database --current >"$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/run.log" >&2; exit 1; fi; grep -F 'DIAMOND database not found' "$tmp/run.log" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-checkm2-negative-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp/input"; printf '>tiny\nATGAAATAA\n' > "$tmp/input/tiny.fna"; if checkm2 testrun --threads 1 --database_path "$tmp/missing.dmnd" >"$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/run.log" >&2; exit 1; fi; grep -Ei 'File does not exist|No such file|database|DIAMOND' "$tmp/run.log" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"
